subcodes.first_line: In this journey, through divine aid and grace, ye must manifest miracles, and your speech must needs be imbued with the utmost spirituality. Say: O Blessed Beauty! [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این سفر باید بعون و عنایت الهی معجز نمائید و صحبت شما باید در نهایت روحانیت باشد بگوئید جمال مبارک
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @unity; oneness of humanity, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @role of the Covenant in preserving unity, @Christ; Christianity
